task.title: Automate implementation-build handoff and publication prep
task.summary: Design and implement the post-task handoff flow so successful work produces compact resume context and implementation-build evidence suitable for commit, PR, issue, release, and push-readiness decisions without unsafe automatic publication.

goal.outcome: After implementation work, CodeWiki records evidence and compact handoff context that can drive closure, resume, commit/PR/issue/release drafts, and push-readiness checks under validation/policy gates.
acceptance: Implementation builds include task/work refs, docs/spec refs, files changed, checks run, acceptance mapping, validation refs, risks, and publication draft fields when useful.
Task closure or checkpoint can persist next focus and compact resume context without relying on chat transcript memory.
Commit, push, release, and remote issue updates are prepared as recommendations and require explicit validation/policy approval before execution.
Pi/VCC/native compaction integration points are isolated in adapters or documented with safe fallbacks.
Smoke or characterization coverage proves resume after handoff uses persisted compact context rather than stale chat state.
non_goals: Do not make automatic remote push the default behavior.
Do not replace builds, roadmap, or validation with chat transcript summaries.
Do not couple core CodeWiki semantics to Pi-only compaction APIs.
verification: Create implementation_build for a documentation-only or small code task
Validate publication-ready fields without executing remote updates
npm test if runtime code changes.

summary: TASK-043 implemented: implementation_build now carries task refs, compact resume handoff, validation/risk refs, and recommendation-only publication drafts; smoke coverage validates the generated fields.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation builds include task/work refs, docs/spec refs, files changed, checks run, acceptance mapping, validation refs, risks, and publication draft fields when useful.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: writeImplementationBuild now emits task snapshot, linked_refs, files_changed, checks_run, acceptance_mapping, validation_refs, risks, unresolved_issues, and publication drafts/policy.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Task closure or checkpoint can persist next focus and compact resume context without relying on chat transcript memory.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: implementation_build.handoff.resume contains source=implementation_build, /wiki-resume command, task id, next_focus_task_id from graph, and compact context from task/build data.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Commit, push, release, and remote issue updates are prepared as recommendations and require explicit validation/policy approval before execution.
Pi/VCC/native compaction integration points are isolated in adapters or documented with safe fallbacks.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: system/extension.md documents host compaction/session-reset as adapter integration point; build fallback says use codewiki_state plus implementation_build.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Smoke or characterization coverage proves resume after handoff uses persisted compact context rather than stale chat state.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: scripts/smoke-test.mjs asserts implementation build handoff.resume and publication policy fields.

risks: Publication drafts are recommendation-only; remote updates remain blocked until explicit approval.
